description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 3, 2025 at 1:32 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Brisbane, California was in a collision 
involving a hand truck dolly on Bayshore Boulevard near Valley Drive. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on Bayshore Boulevard in the leftmost lane of two southbound lanes when an oncoming vehicle 
in the northbound lane struck a hand truck dolly, which was then projected from the northbound lane through the median lane and into the 
southbound lane occupied by the Waymo AV. The front of the Waymo AV then made contact with the hand truck dolly, which became 
lodged at the front of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The 
Waymo AV and the hand truck dolly sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
